description: Operational policy for Claude Code hooks. settings.json remains the runtime source of truth until generation is introduced.

required_hooks.reason: Compresses startup context and preserves startup side effects.
Runs prompt guards and workflow context injection before model judgment.
Blocks non-ASCII AskUserQuestion payloads that can break serialization.
Prevents high-volume direct code generation without explicit delegation path.
Keeps larger code changes aligned with Gemini/agy Phase 0 scan policy.
Keeps local RAG index fresh after content changes.
Captures dependency impact context without blocking edits.
Warns when code changes exist without completed verification.

event_policy.SessionStart: Startup routers may inject compressed context and run silent cache/build/health side effects.
event_policy.UserPromptSubmit: Prompt routers run before Claude model judgment; high-priority guards suppress lower-priority reminders.
event_policy.PreToolUse: Safety and delegation gates run before each tool invocation.
event_policy.PostToolUse: Telemetry, cache updates, indexing, and async analysis run after each tool invocation.
event_policy.Stop: End-of-turn checks summarize, warn, and persist session state.
